description:
## Background

The WebDriver harness passes scenario, phase, fixture paths, and
store paths between three Node processes through raw string env
vars whose meaning is implicit at every call site. This is a
**Primitive Obsession / Mysterious Name** smell (Fowler,
*Refactoring*).

Three independent places read the same environment contract:

- `e2e/issue-list/scripts/run-scenario.ts:73-75` declares the
  `Scenario` union and `isScenario` type guard, and parses the
  CLI argument.
- `wdio.issue-list.conf.ts:33-49` redeclares the `Scenario`
  mapping inline (`rawScenario`, chained `if/else if`), reads
  `BEADSMITH_E2E_WORKSPACE_A`, `BEADSMITH_E2E_WORKSPACE_B`,
  `BEADSMITH_E2E_WORKSPACE_B_SECOND`, and
  `BEADSMITH_WORKSPACE_STORE_PATH` as `string | undefined`, and
  validates each one with its own ad-hoc error string.
- `e2e/issue-list/issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` and
  `e2e/issue-list/issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts` each read
  `process.env.BEADSMITH_E2E_PHASE ?? "1"` and branch on
  `phase === "1" | "2"` inline inside every `it()`.

There is no single function that produces the typed
`{ scenario, phase, fixtureA, fixtureB?, fixtureBSecond?, storePath }`
shape the specs actually need.

## What to build

One typed parser for harness inputs that produces a fully
validated object. Specs and the wdio config consume this parser
instead of raw `process.env.*` reads.

## Technical Approach

This is a **wide refactor** — its blast radius fans across the
harness and three consumer files
(`wdio.issue-list.conf.ts`, `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`,
`issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts`). Sequence as expand–contract
per the project template:

1. **Expand** (`bsm-kia.12.1`) — add typed `Scenario`, `Phase`,
   `HarnessInputs`, and the parsers to
   `e2e/issue-list/scripts/run-scenario.ts` (or a sibling helper).
   No callers yet.
2. **Migrate** (`bsm-kia.12.2`) — replace `process.env.*` reads
   in the wdio config and the two specs with calls to the new
   parser. One commit per directory (`e2e/issue-list/` plus the
   wdio config at the repo root); behavior and error reporting
   stay equivalent (modulo the consolidated error message).
3. **Contract** (`bsm-kia.12.3`) — confirm zero
   `process.env.BEADSMITH_E2E_*` reads in specs and wdio config;
   the launcher (`run-scenario.ts`) is the only env producer and
   keeps its reads.

## Considerations

- Don't break CI between batches. The launcher remains the only
  env producer; consumers switch in one batch.
- The typed shape must match what the existing wdio config
  validates (it throws if `fixtureA` / `fixtureB` / `storePath`
  are missing). Use the same consolidated error message.
- This refactor does not rename env vars; only the consumption
  side becomes typed. The launcher CLI surface (positional args)
  stays unchanged.
- The migrate batch is per-directory: three files in one commit
  (one wdio config at the repo root, two specs in
  `e2e/issue-list/`). The full E2E suite
  (`pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete`) must pass before the contract.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `Scenario`, `Phase`, and `HarnessInputs` types and
      `parseScenario` / `parsePhase` / `parseHarnessEnvironment`
      parsers exist in `e2e/issue-list/scripts/run-scenario.ts`
      (or sibling).
- [ ] `wdio.issue-list.conf.ts` and every spec consume typed
      harness inputs through the shared parser; no spec file or
      wdio config reads `process.env.BEADSMITH_E2E_*` directly.
- [ ] Missing or unknown env values fail with one consolidated
      error that lists every invalid input, not one error per
      `if`.
- [ ] `rg "process\.env\.BEADSMITH_E2E_" wdio.issue-list.conf.ts e2e/issue-list/*.spec.ts`
      returns zero hits.
- [ ] `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` and
      `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` pass.

## Test Plan

- Vitest unit tests for the parsers: each accepts its valid
  inputs, throws on unknown, and `parseHarnessEnvironment` returns
  a complete object when all env vars are present or throws a
  single consolidated error when any are missing.
- Run `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` and
  `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` to prove the migrated shape
  works end to end after the migrate batch and after the
  contract.

## Sub-issues

- `bsm-kia.12.1` — Expand: add typed parser in `run-scenario.ts`
- `bsm-kia.12.2` — Migrate `wdio.issue-list.conf.ts` and the two
  specs to the typed parser
- `bsm-kia.12.3` — Contract: confirm zero `process.env.*` reads
  in specs and wdio config, verify `rg`

comments.text: Implementation plan against current main: place the environment seam in a side-effect-free e2e/issue-list/scripts/harness-inputs.ts module (importing run-scenario.ts would execute the launcher); build parser behavior test-first; migrate wdio.issue-list.conf.ts plus all three current issue-list specs that read raw harness env values; verify the raw-read contract with rg. The issue's restoration spec and complete/isolation scripts were removed by later work, so validation will use the current equivalent pnpm e2e:issue-list:all suite.

Implemented in PR https://github.com/beadsmithy/beadsmithy/pull/46. Review completed on Standards and Spec axes; the missing-value diagnostic consistency finding was addressed in a separate post-review commit.

title: Replace raw env-var primitives with typed Scenario/Phase/fixture inputs
